headlines.headline: Frelis Genomics recalls products in supply chain optimization line due to quality concerns

sentiment.reasoning: A product recall due to quality concerns directly impacts operational costs and brand reputation negatively.

headlines.headline: Xelvol Biotech recalls products in automated logistics line due to quality concerns

sentiment.reasoning: A recall in an automated logistics line suggests operational disruption that will likely weigh on performance until resolved.

headlines.headline: Relvon Fuels reports 20% increase in customer acquisition

sentiment.reasoning: A 20% increase in customer acquisition is a strong positive indicator of growth and future revenue potential.

headlines.headline: Relvon Fuels to host investor day focused on digital payments strategy

sentiment.reasoning: An investor day focused on strategy is a neutral event that provides information but does not immediately change financial fundamentals.

headlines.headline: Wyrnik Sciences withdraws from Scandinavia market citing unfavorable conditions

sentiment.reasoning: Withdrawing from a market indicates a loss of revenue streams and potential exit costs, signaling negative sentiment.

headlines.headline: Relvon Fuels sees 5% drop in new customer orders this quarter

sentiment.reasoning: A 5% drop in new customer orders is a direct negative signal for near-term revenue growth.

headlines.headline: Relvon Fuels lowers full-year guidance amid softening demand

sentiment.reasoning: Lowering full-year guidance due to softening demand is a clear negative signal that directly impacts valuation expectations.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
